notes: Synthetic fixture representing a reasonably compliant retail bank. Strong on pricing transparency, support, and vulnerability. Weaker on product governance signals and cross-selling disclosure.

Products & Services.notes: Product features and target market are clearly stated. Risk warnings present. Governance signal (Fair Value Assessment mention) visible. Slightly weak on conflicts/incentives disclosure.

1.note: Product purpose and features clearly described on product pages.

2.note: Target market stated — UK adults 18+, not suitable for businesses.

3.note: Material risks (overdraft charges, rate variability) described before commitment.

4.note: Fair Value Assessment mentioned on About page.

5.note: Vulnerable customer adaptations referenced (large print, BSL, third party).

6.note: Online and branch distribution channels described appropriately.

7.note: Closed-book / rate changes mentioned — 14 days notice for variable rate reductions.

8.note: Premium account bundles travel and phone insurance — bundling not clearly disaggregated in pricing.

9.note: Summary Box PDF linked; terms and conditions referenced.

10.note: No explicit conflicts or incentives disclosure visible on public pages.

Price & Value.notes: Full fee schedule visible. APR/AER rates shown. Benchmark comparison included. Introductory/promotional rate signposting weak — no explicit note on what happens after promotional savings rates end.

1.note: Full fee schedule on /fees page with all charges listed.

2.note: AER and EAR rates shown clearly for both credit and savings products.

3.note: Ongoing fees, exit restrictions, and cap on overdraft charges stated.

4.note: Fair Value Assessment published annually; mentioned on About page.

5.note: Fixed Rate Bond matures into Easy Access — no explicit promotional rate expiry warning on product page.

6.note: Benchmark comparison for overdraft rate provided on fees page.

7.note: Rate change notice policy stated — 14 days for variable rate reductions.

8.note: Premium account bundle pricing does not clearly separate insurance costs from account fee.

9.note: Monthly vs daily charge frequency stated. Currency clear.

10.note: No evidence of fees hidden behind unnecessary steps in crawled content.

Consumer Understanding.notes: Plain language used throughout. Risk warnings visible. Key deadlines stated. Navigation structure appears sensible. Some marketing language present but balanced with risk/cost context.

1.note: Plain language used — no excessive legal jargon on product pages.

2.note: Overdraft charges and unarranged fee risks clearly signposted on homepage and product page.

3.note: Costs discoverable before commitment — fees page and product pages both show charges.

4.note: Overdraft alert notification and maturity transfer for Fixed Rate Bond stated.

5.note: Site navigation appears logical — product, fees, support all reachable from crawled pages.

6.note: FSCS protection and rate variability stated on savings pages — balances promotional language.

7.note: Summary Box and Terms available/linked from product pages.

8.note: Language appears appropriate for retail audience — no excessive complexity.

9.note: Contact paths clear; overdraft alert and FOS referral paths described.

10.note: Complaints data published but not prominently surfaced — buried in About page.

Consumer Support.notes: Strong support offering. Multiple channels. Hours stated. Complaints process clear including FOS referral. Dedicated financial difficulty page. Vulnerability support well described. Minor gap: no 24/7 channel for emergencies.

1.note: Phone, branch, and online chat options clearly listed on /support.

2.note: Operating hours stated for each channel.

3.note: Complaints process described with 5-day acknowledgement and 8-week resolution timescale; FOS referral mentioned.

4.note: Dedicated financial difficulty page with specific options and referrals to free debt advice.

5.note: Accessibility statement linked; WCAG 2.1 AA compliance stated.

6.note: Vulnerable customer support described — large print, BSL, third party management.

7.note: Financial difficulty page covers common scenarios. Support page covers account queries.

8.note: FOS referral path described as escalation beyond first-line.

9.note: No fraud or card loss reporting guidance visible in crawled pages.

10.note: No evidence of support journeys being obviously obscured.
